content.correction: New content was being created as markdown in rules/ instead of JSON in the KB.
content.how_to_apply: When creating any new knowledge artifact — write it as a JSON doc in .leo/memory/, not as a markdown file in rules/. Only touch rules/*.md if explicitly asked to update legacy content during migration.
content.rule: All new rules, patterns, decisions, feedback go to .leo/memory/ as JSON documents following the schema. The rules/*.md directory is legacy.
content.why: The project architecture is JSON-first. KB docs have schema validation, tags for neural connections, lifecycle management, and are machine-readable. Markdown rules are flat files with no structure or connections.
